prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SHDDBMACFS-MED-BL-IR-TT Product Type: BATTERY Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Heavy Duty D Battery Set Alkaline Cell Batteries for Electronics 2pk Description: The ToolTreaux D-size high-performance batteries are ideal for powering various electronic devices like flashlights, radios, and other household necessities. They are designed to deliver the correct amount of power to these devices and ensure optimal efficiency.

These batteries have an internal voltage power of 1.2V to 1.5V, and most devices that require AAA batteries are designed to work within the range of .9 to 1.5 so these batteries should work with most common electronic devices.

Compact in size, D batteries are great for keeping on hand in case of an emergency. Our 2-pack batteries come shrink-wrapped and can be used immediately as needed or stored for later. Keep them around the house or in your emergency kit to power flashlights, radios, and other power outage must-haves.

The heavy-duty D batteries are made with high-quality cadmium-free and mercury-free materials that you can use safely in your household devices, and they have a longer service life than other generic batteries. In addition to powering emergency devices, use them for other common electronics like cameras, music players, toys, and more.

Please do not recharge these batteries, expose them to fire, disassemble them or mix them with other battery types. They can explode or leak if used improperly. Search Terms: heavy duty cadmium mercury-free battery useful electronic device high-quality material durability longer service reliable high-performance power efficiency longlasting immediately stored radios flashlight emergency camera clock recharge Features: - HIGH-PERFORMANCE D BATTERIES - The ToolTreaux D batteries are ideal for powering common electronic devices like flashlights, radios, and other household items. They will deliver the correct amount of power to devices that require D batteries while providing optimal efficiency. - MERCURY AND CADMIUM FREE - These batteries are both mercury and cadmium free so you can use their safety in your household electronics. They have a longer service life than other generic batteries and are great for toys, cameras, and music players. - SHRINK-WRAPPED FOR STORAGE - Each set of 2 batteries comes shrink-wrapped so you can use them immediately or store them safely until needed. Keep them around the house or in your emergency kit to power radios, flashlights, and other power outage devices. v - NOT RECHARGEABLE - Please note that these D batteries are single-use only and not rechargeable. Do not expose them to fire, use them with other battery types or disassemble them. They can explode or leak if used improperly. - SPECIFICATIONS - Battery size: D; Voltage: 1.5V; Shrink-wrapped; Pack size: 2; Mercury and cadmium free; Single use batteries (non-rechargeable) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Heavy Duty D Battery Alkaline 2-Pack

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 2-Pk D Heavy Duty Alkaline Batteries

anthropic.title_differentiation: Mercury And Cadmium Free, High-Performance 15V, Shrink-Wrapped, Long Service Life, Emergency Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Mercury And Cadmium Free, Shrink Wrapped For Storage, 15V, Single Use, Ideal For Flashlights And Radios
